summary: Frontend-only UI redesign verification (ChatDay-style). Tested at 1440x900. All new sidebar nav items, login button, welcome emblem, and regression flows pass with 0 console errors and 0 React key warnings.

sidebar_nav.nav-new-chat: PASS - 'Nuevo Chat' label, resets to welcome state with emblem
sidebar_nav.nav-image: PASS - 'Imagen' label, clicking triggers hidden file-input, no JS errors
sidebar_nav.nav-search: PASS - 'Búsquedas' label, toggles search-mode-chip ('Web search on') and adds cyan active highlight; second click removes both
sidebar_nav.historial_label: PASS - 'Historial' uppercase label visible above conversation list
sidebar_nav.language_selector: PASS - 8 options found: darija, tamazight-rif, tamazight-atlas, tamazight-souss, arabic, french, english, spanish

header_login_button.visibility: PASS - login-button visible top-right at desktop width with text 'Iniciar sesión'
header_login_button.toast_on_click: PASS - toast 'Inicio de sesión próximamente' shown on click
header_login_button.no_navigation: PASS - URL unchanged after click, no errors

welcome_emblem.rendered: PASS - data-testid welcome-emblem present centered above heading 'How can I help you?'
welcome_emblem.image_loaded: PASS - naturalWidth=1024 (loaded successfully from EMBLEM url)

regression.text_chat_streaming: PASS - assistant streamed reply received in Darija (أوكي 👍), 1 history-item created
regression.web_search_flow: PASS - 'Searching the web…' indicator shown, 6 source-link cards rendered in assistant message
regression.sign_language_modal: PASS - sign-language-record-button opens sign-language-modal (camera denied in headless as expected)

critical_code_review_comments: ChatMaroc.jsx is ~885 lines — consider splitting into smaller modules (Header, ChatComposer, WelcomeScreen, MessageList) in a future iteration for maintainability (>700 line guideline).
Sidebar brand block still uses the Sparkles icon (cyan square) while the welcome screen uses the new Moroccan-flag emblem — minor branding inconsistency, not a bug. Consider unifying.
navImage maps to a file picker rather than image generation, and 'Búsquedas' maps to web search — these are intentional per problem statement; just worth documenting in the UI tooltip for end users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 review-request bullets verified at 1440x900. New Sidebar/login/emblem UI is solid. Backend untouched and was 32/32 in iteration_7. If main agent makes more UI tweaks, focus next on mobile drawer parity (md<) since this iteration only covered desktop md+.
